page: Amazon Web Services g4ad.8xlarge is a graphics-intensive server instance powered by AMD hardware. It features 32 vCPUs and 16 physical cores from an AMD EPYC 7R32 processor operating at 3.0 GHz, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of DDR4 memory running at 3 GHz, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For graphics and parallel processing workloads, the instance is equipped with two AMD Radeon Pro Navi V520 GPUs, delivering a total of 16 GB of VRAM. Local storage is provided via a 1200 GB NVMe SSD instance store volume, and network connectivity is supported by a 15 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Performance benchmarks indicate a balanced profile with specific trade-offs. The instance demonstrates average multi-core CPU performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 12247.31 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 11335.0. However, single-core CPU performance is relatively weak, with stress-ng single-core scoring in the bottom 10% at 764.79. Memory performance is a notable strength, with the Passmark memory score rated as strong in the top 25% at 2843.48. Large block memory read and write bandwidths are average at 67.78 GB/sec and 41.12 GB/sec respectively. Large-scale LLM inference is a limitation, as prompt processing for a 70B model is weak at 5.97 tokens/sec, and text generation data is unavailable for that size, though smaller 135M and 7B models achieve average inference speeds.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the integration of dedicated AMD Radeon GPUs and local NVMe SSD storage within a single instance provides a resource-dense platform for graphics-heavy and storage-dependent tasks without requiring separate storage attachments. This configuration is well-suited for workloads such as graphics rendering, image processing, ray tracing, and moderate database operations. It is also appropriate for software compilation and web serving, though it is less optimal for single-threaded compute-bound tasks or large-scale LLM deployment.
description: Amazon Web Services g4ad.8xlarge is a graphics-intensive instance featuring 32 vCPUs from an AMD EPYC 7R32 processor, 128.0 GB of DDR4 RAM, and two AMD Radeon Pro Navi V520 GPUs with 16 GB of total VRAM. It includes a 1200 GB NVMe SSD local instance store and a 15 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmarks show average multi-core CPU and strong memory performance, though single-core CPU performance is poor. This instance is suitable for graphics rendering, image processing, software compilation, and database operations.

tagline: A graphics-accelerated platform combining dedicated AMD processors, dual Radeon GPUs, and high-speed local NVMe storage for parallel workloads.
bullet_points: Equipped with 32 vCPUs from an AMD EPYC 7R32 processor and 128 GB DDR4 RAM.
Features two AMD Radeon Pro Navi V520 GPUs with 16 GB total VRAM.
Includes 1200 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and 15 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
Delivers strong memory performance and average multi-core processing capabilities.
Suited for graphics rendering, image processing, and moderate database workloads.
